title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in despite multiple password resets.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Visa card ending 1234 keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download January invoice from billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Billing address shows wrong city even after update.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Refund requested two weeks ago not received yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer not receiving 2FA codes on registered phone.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Upload failed error when changing profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Toggle for auto-renewal disabled in subscription settings.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Order placed but no confirmation email received.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Pages take too long to load during peak hours.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: Customer not receiving any system notifications.

title: Account Locked After Failed Attempts
description: Account locked too quickly after 2 failed login attempts.

title: Mobile Notifications Delayed
description: Push notifications arrive 30 minutes late on iOS devices.
